DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS7-L2-13001400-MSSS7-STP-AAD-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 7 • Fall of the Roman Empire

The Bishop of Hippo

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students mainly doing?
2QUESTION 2: Where was Augustine a bishop?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Why does the girl reframe the pitch the way she does, and why does the boy respond to her idea the way he does? How do their purposes fit together across the conversation?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CA HSS 7.1  |  MS Social Studies Grade 7: Fall of the Roman Empire
